faq.description: Still have questions about the strategy call? We’ve collected the most common ones for you.

items.question: How quickly will my website be ready?
items.answer: We deliver a standard business website within 5 working days, provided content and assets are delivered on time. For webshops or more complex projects we’ll define a separate timeline together.

items.question: Can I update my website myself after delivery?
items.answer: Yes. We set up an easy‑to‑use CMS so you can add content such as blog posts and images yourself. For larger changes to the design or structure you can always submit a request to our team.

items.question: What if I don’t have content yet – texts or photos?
items.answer: No problem. Based on a short questionnaire or your current website we write the texts for you. We use stock or AI‑generated images if you don’t have your own visuals. This can be added as an optional extra.

items.question: Am I tied to a contract or subscription?
items.answer: No. You pay once for the development of your website. We strongly recommend our own hosting — it’s optimised for speed, security and uptime. If you prefer to host elsewhere, we provide a full handover of your website.

items.question: What does the process look like?
items.answer: We start with a short introduction call (online, 20 minutes) to understand your goals and wishes. Then we work in five phases: intake & analysis, design, development, testing and launch. You’re involved in every phase and can give feedback at any time.

items.question: Do you work with fixed packages or custom solutions?
items.answer: Both. We first look at what you really need and what fits your budget. Some clients start with a clean one‑pager, others want a fully developed website with multiple pages and functionalities. We think along with you and give honest advice.

items.question: Can I request changes during the process?
items.answer: Yes. We work with fixed feedback rounds during the project, so you always know where things stand. Feedback within the agreed scope is processed without extra costs. Larger changes are discussed first in terms of time and budget.

items.question: Do you offer a free preview?
items.answer: Yes. Before you commit, we show you a design concept based on your brand and goals. That way you know exactly what you’ll get before the project starts.

items.question: Do I get a unique design or a template?
items.answer: Every design is custom made. We don’t use off‑the‑shelf templates, but create a look & feel that fits your brand, audience and goals.

items.question: Is my website optimised for mobile?
items.answer: Always. We build mobile‑first: your website works perfectly on smartphone, tablet and desktop. Before launch we test on multiple screen sizes and browsers.

items.question: Will my website be fast and SEO‑friendly?
items.answer: Yes. Technical SEO is included by default: fast loading times, clean code, correct meta tags, structured data and mobile‑friendly design. On average our websites score 90+ on Google PageSpeed Insights.

items.question: Which technology do you use?
items.answer: We work with modern technologies like React, Next.js and TypeScript, combined with reliable cloud hosting. We always choose the stack that best fits your project and needs.

items.question: Is my website GDPR compliant?
items.answer: We build in line with GDPR requirements: cookie consent, privacy policy, secure data storage and opt‑in mechanisms. We advise you on what’s legally required, but final responsibility lies with you as the business owner.

items.question: How much does a website cost at WebDirect?
items.answer: Websites start from €695 for a one‑pager. Most projects fall between €1,000 and €2,000. For larger websites or web applications we use higher rates depending on complexity. You’ll always receive a tailored quote.

items.question: Are there any hidden costs?
items.answer: No. We’re transparent about all costs from day one. You pay once for the development. Any hosting or maintenance fees are discussed and agreed upfront.

items.question: Can I pay in instalments?
items.answer: Yes. For larger projects we work with a phased payment schedule: a part at the start, a part after design approval and the remaining amount upon delivery. We align this in the intake call.

items.question: What are the costs for hosting and maintenance?
items.answer: Hosting and maintenance are optional and quoted separately. They typically include: SSL certificate, daily backups, security monitoring, software updates and small content changes. For larger changes we create a separate quote.

items.question: Do I own my website?
items.answer: Yes. All content, designs and assets belong to you. The source code is clean and documented. You can always decide to host elsewhere – we’ll then provide all files, database and documentation.

items.question: What if I want to switch to another provider later?
items.answer: No problem. We deliver a complete export of the website including all files and credentials.

items.question: Do you make backups?
items.answer: Yes. Automatic daily backups are standard. We keep multiple restore points so we can roll back quickly in case of issues. Backups are stored off‑site.

items.question: What support do you offer after launch?
items.answer: After launch we offer a post‑launch period for bug fixes and small adjustments. Clients with a maintenance plan have a dedicated point of contact. For critical issues (site down) we respond within 1 hour; other questions within 24 hours on working days.

items.question: Can I expand or add new features later?
items.answer: Absolutely. Many clients continue working with us after launch for new pages, features or optimisations. We’re ready to grow with your business.

items.question: Can you build integrations with other systems?
items.answer: Yes. We regularly integrate with CRM systems, accounting tools, payment providers, marketing tools and custom APIs. We discuss your integration needs during the intake.

items.question: Can you build a webshop or client portal?
items.answer: Yes. We build e‑commerce solutions with product catalogues, cart, payment integrations (iDEAL/Wero, PayPal, credit card) and stock management. Secure client portals with login and personal dashboards are also possible.

cta.description: Book your call now and receive a completely non‑binding web design for your business.

process.description: In five simple steps from first introduction to a modern, results-driven website.

steps.title: Book a free call
steps.description: Choose a time that works for you and fill out the short questionnaire. That way we already know who you are and what you need.

steps.title: Free web design concept
steps.description: Based on your answers we create an initial web design. No obligations – you see what’s possible before you make a decision.

steps.title: The meeting
steps.description: We meet for a 20‑minute strategy call. We present the design, discuss your goals and decide on the best approach for your website.

steps.title: Website development
steps.description: After your approval we start building. We keep you updated via fixed feedback rounds. On average your website is online within 5 working days.

steps.title: Launch of your new website
steps.description: Your website goes live. Together we walk through the CMS so you can manage content yourself. From that moment your brand is online.

ctaSection.title: Ready to get started?
ctaSection.description: We look forward to building a powerful digital experience together. Book your free introduction call today.

testimonials.content: Working with WebDirect was transformative. The design elevated our brand and user experience to new heights. Their attention to detail is unmatched.
testimonials.author: Alex Rivera

testimonials.content: The team’s expertise in both UX and visual design made our project seamless. They delivered beyond expectations and hit every milestone on time.
testimonials.author: Nina Patel

testimonials.content: Exceptional partner with a strategic mindset. WebDirect helped us rethink our entire product experience from the ground up.
testimonials.author: Marcus Webb

reviews.description: Professional, skilled and great to work with. Turned complex ideas into something simple and clear.
A real game‑changer for our startup. Took care of both strategy and execution from A to Z.
Handled everything from UX to backend without any issues.
A game‑changer for our company. Brought strategy and execution together perfectly.
Everything now lives in one place and the experience is incredibly smooth.
If you’re looking for a design that looks amazing and performs even better.
We felt heard at every step and the final result exceeded expectations.
The website they built increased our conversion rate significantly in the first month.

footer.brandDescription: At WebDirect we design digital experiences that engage, connect and inspire. From modern websites to innovative applications.

whyChoose.description: We build conversion‑first websites in code. No WordPress or Webflow templates. Faster, more powerful and scalable without limitations.

conversion-design.title: Conversion‑first design
conversion-design.description: We design websites that are built to bring in customers, not just to “look nice”.

custom-code.title: 100% custom code
custom-code.description: Everything is built custom in React and Next.js. No builders, no templates, no limits.

fast-performance.title: Super fast performance
fast-performance.description: Fast load times improve SEO, build trust and lead to higher conversion.

scalable.title: Built to scale
scalable.description: Add new pages, campaigns or funnels without needing to rebuild your site.

seo-ready.title: SEO‑ready structure
seo-ready.description: Technical SEO is built‑in by default. Clean code, strong structure and great indexation in Google.

premium-quality.title: Premium look without agency pricing
premium-quality.description: Our AI‑driven workflow lets us deliver high‑end quality faster and often cheaper than traditional agencies.

mobile-first.title: Perfect on mobile
mobile-first.description: Mobile‑first design so your site feels sharp, fast and professional on every screen.

support.title: Support and optimisation
support.description: Not just “deliver a website and done”. We stay involved and optimise where needed.
